svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="DrawioJSAPI/1.0.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="diagram-1" name="Chatbot RAG AgentCore - Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="2149" dy="900" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="aws-cloud" parent="1"
